MAY SUBMIT IT BY LEAVING IT IN CIVL FILINGS DROP BOX AT THE COURTHOUSE IN THE LOBBY OR VIA MAIL ALONG WITH S.A.S.E. AND PAYMENT OF $40 TO HAVE IT ISSUED.
